data.description: Qatar: Embassy in Kyiv was struck Thursday night

data.title: EpicQuest Education honored with CES Speed Award for global branding by pioneering AI integration in higher education.
data.description: EpicQuest Education Group International Limited (Nasdaq: EEIQ) has been honored for its successful internationalization strategy, which includes exporting academic programs and leading initiatives that incorporate artificial intelligence into higher education. The award underscores the company's efforts in expanding globally and innovating in the education sector. This recognition comes as of January 9, 2026, in Toledo, Ohio. EpicQuest has demonstrated its commitment to advancements in education, particularly in AI integration, setting a precedent in the industry.
Colombian President Gustavo Petro does not rule out the possibility of a US military action against his country following the recent operation in Venezuela

data.title: EU reaches groundbreaking free-trade deal with 4 South American countries: Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay. Significant move for global cooperation.
data.description: A pact involving Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay indicates a joint effort for enhanced international collaboration, showcasing a departure from the approach of the United States, which has been resorting to pressure tactics in its interactions with other nations.

data.title: Brado and Santé Ventures partner to create Brado AI, a tech entity using AI to extend provider reach in healthcare.
data.description: In response to a strategic investment partnership, Brado, a healthcare technology company, has launched Brado AI, a new dedicated technology entity focused on expanding provider reach through conversational AI. The partnership, announced on January 9, 2026, aims to enhance healthcare engagement.

data.title: Lone Star Fund buys Coral Gables office complex in Florida. Totaling 326,451-square-feet, the Class A property is in downtown Coral Gables, FL.
data.description: Lone Star Funds has finalized the purchase of The Alhambra, an office complex in South Florida, in collaboration with Highline Real Estate Capital LLC and Square2 Capital LLC. The acquisition was completed by an affiliate of Lone Star Real Estate Fund VII, L.P. The Class A property, situated in downtown Coral Gables, FL, within the Miami-Dade area, consists of two buildings adjacent to a Hyatt Regency Hotel, with a combined area of 326,451 square feet.

data.title: Franklin Street Prop declares $0.01 quarterly dividend for period Oct 1, 2025-Dec 31, 2025. Payable Feb 12, 2026 to stockholders.
data.description: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, Franklin Street Properties Corp. (NYSE American: FSP) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.01 per common stock share for the quarter spanning from October 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025. The dividend will be distributed on February 12, 2026, to shareholders registered as of January 23, 2026. Additional updates regarding FSP can be accessed on their website, www.fspreit.com. Information related to the company is frequently shared on the site.

data.title: Bain Capital and BlueWater Marinas acquire Kent Narrows Boatel, the fourth marina in their portfolio.
data.description: BlueWater Marinas, based in Boston and Charleston, has recently acquired Kent Narrows Boatel (KNB), a top-notch heated drystack marina near Annapolis, Maryland. KNB, a Class-A facility opened in 2017, has quickly established itself as a vital part of the local boating scene. This marks the fourth marina to join the Bain Capital/BlueWater group. The marina is strategically located outside Annapolis and boasts high-quality operations and excellent facilities. Located near the Bay Bridge, KNB further enhances the portfolio of BlueWater Marinas.

data.title: Orion Digital Corp. strengthens its balance sheet by exiting WonderFi investment, increasing cash to CDN$27M.
data.description: Orion Digital Corp., a digital finance platform listed on NASDAQ and TSX under the tickers ORIO, announced the successful sale of its equity stake in WonderFi Technologies Inc. The company's cash reserves have seen a significant boost of over 50% compared to Q3 2025, now sitting at around CDN$27 million. This strategic move further strengthens Orion Digital's financial position and emphasizes its focus on wealth, payments, and digital assets.

data.title: Rhode Island School Fair on Jan 24 will showcase 30+ education options for Providence parents at Crowne Plaza.
data.description: In Providence, Rhode Island, a school fair will take place on Saturday, January 24, 2026, at the Crowne Plaza starting at 10:00 AM. Parents in the area can explore over 30 public, charter, and private schools in one location on that day. This event aims to provide families with information to help make informed decisions about their children's education.

data.title: Gold Reserve Ltd. grants 1,525,000 stock options to officers, employees, etc. at $3.64/share for 5 years. (Num of options, price, duration)
data.description: Gold Reserve Ltd. has recently disclosed the issuance of 1,525,000 stock options to a variety of individuals associated with the company, including directors, officers, employees, and key consultants. The options have an exercise period of five years and can be exercised at a price of US$3.64 per share. This issuance was made in adherence to the company's 2012 Equity Incentive Plan.

data.title: At CES 2026, The Things Industries reveals $2 billion impact from their IoT platform, ushering in a new era of mature IoT.
data.description: Las Vegas, on January 9, 2026: The Things Industries disclosed that organizations leveraging low power IoT connected systems on their enterprise platform 'The Things Stack' have generated over two billion dollars in global economic value per year. This achievement marks a significant milestone in the industry...

data.title: Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. grants awards under NASDAQ rule 5635(c)(4). No specific numbers provided.
data.description: In South San Francisco, California on January 9, 2026, Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that they have awarded grants in accordance with the Rigel Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Inducement Plan. These awards were approved by the Compensation Committee of Rigel's Board of Directors. Rigel is listed on the Nasdaq as RIGL.

data.title: GigaCloud Tech. to present at 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference on Jan 16, 2026, at 2:15 p.m. ET/11:15 a.m. PT.
data.description: In El Monte, California, on January 9, 2026, GigaCloud Technology Inc (Nasdaq: GCT), a leading provider of B2B technology solutions for large parcel merchandise, revealed that Larry Wu, the company's Founder and CEO, is set to speak at the upcoming 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference. The event is scheduled for January 16, 2026, at 2:15 p.m. ET/11:15 a.m. PT.

data.title: Cellectar Biosciences will present strategic plans for 2026 at Biotech Showcase, aiming to seek conditional marketing approval from EMA for Iopofosine I 131 for WM treatment by 3Q 2026.
data.description: In accordance with advice from the European Medicines Agency's (EMA) Scientific Advice Working Party (SAWP) on Iopofosine I 131 for Waldenstrom's Macroglobulinemia (WM) treatment, a submission for Conditional Marketing Approval in Europe is anticipated in the third quarter of 2026.

The Mayor of Kyiv, Klitschko, urged city residents to leave the capital if possible due to problems with heat and electricity supply. He noted that half of Kyiv's apartment buildings are without heating, and there are also disruptions in water supply in the city.
